mapper.select: select distinct m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.path, m.component, m.query_param, m.visible, m.status, m.perms, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, m.create_time from sys_menu m left join sys_role_menu rm on m.menu_id = rm.menu_id left join sys_user_role sur on rm.role_id = sur.role_id left join sys_role ro on sur.role_id = ro.role_id ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}

select distinct m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.route_name, m.path, m.component, m.query_param, m.visible, m.status, m.perms, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, m.create_time from sys_menu m left join sys_role_menu rm on m.menu_id = rm.menu_id left join sys_user_role sur on rm.role_id = sur.role_id left join sys_role ro on sur.role_id = ro.role_id where sur.user_id = #{userId} and m.menu_type in ('M', 'C') and m.status = '0' and ro.status = '0' order by m.parent_id, m.order_num

select distinct m.perms from sys_menu m left join sys_role_menu rm on m.menu_id = rm.menu_id left join sys_user_role sur on rm.role_id = sur.role_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = sur.role_id where m.status = '0' and r.status = '0' and sur.user_id = #{userId}
select distinct m.* from sys_menu m where (m.scope = #{scope} or m.scope = 'BOTH') and m.status = '0'

select distinct m.menu_id from sys_menu m left join sys_role_menu rm on m.menu_id = rm.menu_id left join sys_user_role sur on rm.role_id = sur.role_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = sur.role_id where m.status = '0' and r.status = '0' and sur.user_id = #{userId}

select distinct m.scope from sys_menu m where m.menu_id in
#{menuId}

select distinct m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.route_name, m.path, m.component, m.query_param, m.visible, m.status, m.perms, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, m.create_time from sys_menu m left join sys_role_menu rm on m.menu_id = rm.menu_id left join sys_role_post srp on srp.role_id = rm.role_id left join sys_user_post sup on sup.post_id = srp.post_id left join sys_role ro on srp.role_id = ro.role_id where sup.user_id = #{userId} and m.menu_type in ('M', 'C') and m.status = '0' and ro.status = '0' order by m.parent_id, m.order_num

select distinct m.perms from sys_menu m left join sys_role_menu rm on m.menu_id = rm.menu_id left join sys_role_post srp on srp.role_id = rm.role_id left join sys_user_post sup on sup.post_id = srp.post_id left join sys_role ro on srp.role_id = ro.role_id left join sys_user u on sup.user_id = u.user_id left join sys_post sp on sp.post_id = sup.post_id where u.user_id = #{userId} and m.status = '0' and ro.status = '0' and sp.status = '0'
